song.title: The Love of Christ
song.author: Gayla Borders, Jeff A. Borders, Lowell Alexander
song.presentation: C V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[C] . A D A E How long, how wide is the love of Christ . A D A E A How deep, how high is the love of Christ
[V1] .D A E A D A E It would take ten thousand lifetimes to comprehend .D A E A D A E A love with no beginning, a love that knows no end
[V2] More than any heart could measure Or ever hold His love could fill the oceans 'Til they overflowed
[B] .A Higher than the mountains .D Deeper than the ocean .A E Farther than the reach of the sky .A Wider than the heavens .D Longer than forever .A E Greater is the love of Christ
